mapper.select: SELECT SEQNO AS seqNo ,REGIST_DT ,UPD_DT ,CTGRY_CD ,POPUP_YN ,BTN_FLG ,BTN_URL ,BTN_NAME ,TITLE ,S_DATE ,S_TIME ,E_DATE ,E_TIME ,ATTFILE_ICO_URL ,ATTFILE_ICO_IMG ,CONTENTS ,APP_STATUS ,D_FLAG FROM UIDBS01.MA30_FW_NOTICE_MGT WHERE CTGRY_CD = #{ctrgyCd} AND (CONCAT(REPLACE(S_DATE, '-', ''), S_TIME) <= VARCHAR_FORMAT(CURRENT TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDDHH24') ) AND (CONCAT(REPLACE(E_DATE, '-', ''), E_TIME) >= VARCHAR_FORMAT(CURRENT TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDDHH24') ) AND APP_STATUS = 'PF4005' AND D_FLAG = 'Z00001' WITH UR
